home.meta_description: Discover personalized care & expertise at our center. We blend artistry and precision to enhance your professional confidence through high-quality education and training.
home.meta_keywords: plastic surgery, courses, dermatology, medical training, aesthetic
home.about_desc: CAPS Academy is an educational platform dedicated to advancing excellence in aesthetic and plastic surgery through high-level scientific programs, international faculty collaboration, cadaver-based hands-on training, and live surgical demonstrations. Over the past years, we have developed a comprehensive series of specialized courses that continue to gain regional and global recognition.
home.technique_desc: CAPS Academy is committed to academic excellence, innovation, and the continuous advancement of medical education in aesthetics and surgery.
gallery.video_not_supported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
about_caps.meta_desc: Discover :site_name: Advanced Aesthetic Care & Beauty Excellence. We provide expert consultation and personalized treatment for skin, facial, and beauty concerns through cutting-edge technologies.
about_caps.meta_keywords: Aesthetic Care, Beauty Excellence, Facial Plastic Surgery, Dermatology, Dr. Mohamed Mamdouh, Cosmetic Surgery
about_caps.hero_desc: Unlock the complexities of the human body with our premium Human Anatomy courses. Designed for medical students and healthcare professionals, our curriculum bridges the gap between theoretical knowledge and clinical application. Through high-definition visualizations, interactive 3D models, and expert-led instruction, you will gain a profound understanding of anatomical structures and organ systems, laying a solid foundation for your medical career
about_caps.mission_desc: Our mission is to provide a comprehensive and immersive learning experience for facial plastic surgeons, focusing on the latest techniques and technologies in facial plastic surgery, dermatology, and aesthetic procedures. We strive to create a supportive and interactive environment that fosters learning, innovation, and collaboration.
about_caps.about_desc: Our specialized approach to aesthetic care ensures that each patient receives expert consultation and personalized treatment for skin, facial, and beauty concerns. We are committed to advancing aesthetic medicine through cutting-edge technologies, innovative treatments, and compassionate patient care.

board.meta_desc: Meet our experienced and renowned facial plastic surgeons, dermatologists, and aesthetic experts.
board.founder_bio: Dr. Mohamed Mamdouh is an Associate Professor of Plastic Surgery at Ain Shams University with over 14 years of expertise. A Fellow of Ulsan University (South Korea), he specializes in advanced facial aesthetics, reconstructive surgery (specifically permanent filler removal), and body contouring. He is an active member of EAFPS, ISAPS, and the Egyptian Society of Plastic Surgeons.
board.advisors_title: Meet With our Happy & Honest advisor
